extraction.one_line_summary: POGACAR attacked on the Passo di Ganda descent (40km out), extended gap through Madonna del Ghisallo hairpins despite cramps, won by 1 minute
tactical_patterns: Adam Yates initiated selection on penultimate climb with 40km remaining, thinning field before Pogacar's descent attack
Pogacar attacked on Passo di Ganda descent not summit, reversing his 2021 weakness on same 19 hairpins
Visma isolated without Wout van Aert: Roglic finished third without teammates in decisive seven-rider selection group

rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: positive: showed cramp management at 12km to go but maintained solo effort, overcame previous descent weakness on identical terrain
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: crashed 21km in, distanced when Adam Yates attacked with 40km remaining, never rejoined elite group
rider_signals.YATES Adam: positive: initiated winning move on penultimate climb, demonstrating UAE team depth allowed sacrificial pace-setting
rider_signals.MAS Enric: negative: dropped early when Soudal Quickstep raised tempo, unable to reach final selection despite Monument pedigree
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: negative: Olympic champion dropped before final selection, finished 8th despite Monument-winning résumé
